y_axis.title: Probability of daily survival
y_axis.notes: Two-line label rendered above the y-tick column rather than rotated alongside it. The (p) parenthetical maps to the _p suffix in data.csv column 'daily_survival_p'.

series_legend.marker_shape: diamond with black outline, white interior

notes: y range is unusually narrow (0.93-0.98) so per-pixel y precision matters. Six legend entries — three scatter shapes + three line styles. The §3b paired-edge subtraction recipe is essential here because the markers fuse with same-color fit curves. AUDIT-FLAGGED DEFECT: 27°C scatter Recall=0.56 in baseline; matched-frame step 1 confirms ~11 source gray squares without ringed overlays (fused with the solid 27°C curve). 30°C diamonds here are TRULY OPEN (white interior, thin black outline) — distinct from el-88 where '30°C' was filled with light gray. Pixel-probe a marker before reusing the §2b classifier.
